languages.text: {n}Ваши старания так и не увенчались успехом. Вы отступаете на шаг от распластавшегося на койке мертвеца и утираете пот со лба окровавленной рукой.{/n}
{n}Your efforts have failed. You step away from the dead man in the bed and wipe the sweat from your brow with your bloodied hand.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ваши старания так и не увенчались успехом. Вы отступаете на шаг от распластавшегося на койке мертвеца и утираете пот со лба окровавленной рукой.{/n}

{n}Your efforts have failed. You step away from the dead man in the bed and wipe the sweat from your brow with your bloodied hand.{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたの努力は無駄だった。ベッドの死んだ男から離れ、血まみれの手で額の汗を拭く。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your efforts have failed. You step away from the dead man in the bed and wipe the sweat from your brow with your bloodied hand.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}君の努力は無駄だった。ベッドの死んだ男から離れ、血まみれの手で額の汗を拭く。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vos efforts sont vains. Vous vous éloignez du cadavre allongé dans le lit et passez votre main couverte de sang sur votre front pour en essuyer la sueur.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your efforts have failed. You step away from the dead man in the bed and wipe the sweat from your brow with your bloodied hand.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vos efforts sont vains. Vous vous éloignez du cadavre allongé dans le lit et passez votre main couverte de sang sur votre front pour en essuyer la sueur.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Çabaların başarısız oluyor. Yataktaki ölü adamdan uzaklaşıyor ve kanlı elinle alnındaki teri siliyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your efforts have failed. You step away from the dead man in the bed and wipe the sweat from your brow with your bloodied hand.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Çabaların başarısız oluyor. Yataktaki ölü adamdan uzaklaşıyor ve kanlı elinle alnındaki teri siliyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Deine Bemühungen waren vergebens. Du trittst von dem Toten im Bett zurück und wischst dir mit deiner blutigen Hand den Schweiß von der Stirn.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your efforts have failed. You step away from the dead man in the bed and wipe the sweat from your brow with your bloodied hand.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Deine Bemühungen waren vergebens. Du trittst von dem Toten im Bett zurück und wischst dir mit deiner blutigen Hand den Schweiß von der Stirn.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tus esfuerzos no han bastado. Te alejas del hombre muerto de la cama y te limpias el sudor de la frente con el dorso de tu mano ensangrentada.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your efforts have failed. You step away from the dead man in the bed and wipe the sweat from your brow with your bloodied hand.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tus esfuerzos no han bastado. Te alejas del hombre muerto de la cama y te limpias el sudor de la frente con el dorso de tu mano ensangrentada.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你的努力以失败告终。你从死者床畔走开，用血迹斑斑的手擦去眉间的汗水。{/n}
